content: Hybrid storage: S3 primary + EFS for POSIX workspaces. EFS Access Points per tenant for isolation. Cost: ~/mo per 100 tenants, negligible vs LLM spend.

name: observability-stack-security-compliance
description: SNS alarm topics and CloudWatch log groups must use KMS encryption (platformKey from SecurityStack) for security compliance and multi-tenant data isolation

name: xray-tracing-group-service-filter
description: X-Ray tracing groups use filterExpression='service("chimera-*")' to aggregate traces across all microservices (ECS, Lambda, API Gateway) for end-to-end distributed tracing visibility

name: cloudwatch-dashboard-real-metrics
description: Replace placeholder TextWidgets with actual GraphWidgets using AWS service namespaces (AWS/ApiGateway, AWS/ECS, AWS/Lambda) for prod-ready monitoring dashboards

name: placeholder-implementation-pattern
description: Core package uses placeholder implementations for AWS SDK integration (AgentCore Runtime API, AgentCore Memory API). Allows TypeScript build/test now, actual AWS SDK integration later. Each method returns mock/error with 'not yet implemented' message.

name: type-collision-resolution-monorepo
description: When merging independent modules with type collisions (ToolCall, MemoryResult), prefix types with module name (MemoryToolCall, MemoryQueryResult) to maintain backward compatibility. Pattern: {Module}{OriginalType} naming avoids cascading refactors.

name: ecs-fargate-sse-streaming-gateway
description: ECS Fargate service for SSE streaming (Vercel AI SDK): ALB (public subnets) -> Fargate tasks (private subnets), auto-scaling on CPU/memory, IAM execution role (pull images/logs/secrets) separate from task role (DynamoDB/Bedrock/SecretsManager runtime access), placeholder Docker image replaced by CI/CD, 30s ALB deregistration delay for graceful shutdown.

name: skill-registry-naming-collision
description: When both tools/ and skills/ modules export SkillRegistry, use explicit re-export with alias (SkillRegistryService) in main index.ts to avoid TypeScript collision. tools/SkillRegistry is in-memory prototype with adapters, skills/SkillRegistry is DDB-backed production service.

name: skill-pipeline-step-functions
description: 7-stage security scanning pipeline for marketplace skills. Uses Step Functions Standard with Lambda tasks for: (1) Static Analysis, (2) Dependency Audit, (3) Sandbox Run, (4) Permission Validation, (5) Signing, (6) Monitoring Config, (7) Community Reporting. Choice states branch on stage results, .addCatch() handles errors, failure notification Lambda runs before ScanRejected termination. Enables clear audit trail and graceful failure recovery.

name: tsconfig-sourcemap-inheritance-conflict
description: When extending parent tsconfig.json, child configs must not redeclare conflicting compiler options. Parent with sourceMap:true conflicts with child inlineSourceMap:true (TS5053). Solution: remove inline* options from child, inherit parent's sourceMap. Applies to monorepo project references.

name: github-actions-cicd-workflows
description: Three-workflow CI/CD pipeline for Chimera: (1) ci.yml - PR validation with parallel fast-feedback jobs (lint/typecheck/tests/cdk-synth/security), (2) deploy.yml - Canary deployment with progressive rollout (5% -> 25% -> 50% -> 100%) and CloudWatch alarm monitoring, (3) security-scan.yml - Multi-layer security scanning (Trivy, Snyk, CodeQL, Semgrep, TruffleHog, cdk-nag, Checkov) aligned with OWASP LLM Top 10.

name: codepipeline-canary-orchestration
description: CodePipeline integrates with Step Functions for canary deployment orchestration. Pipeline stage invokes Step Functions state machine passing artifact metadata. State machine coordinates: (1) canary deploy (5% traffic), (2) 30-min bake with CloudWatch metric validation, (3) progressive rollout (25→50→100%) with wait states, (4) auto-rollback on validation failure. Lambda functions wrap Bedrock Agent Runtime API calls for traffic shifting. CloudWatch alarms trigger SNS notifications but Step Functions validates metrics programmatically during bake period.

name: codebuild-multi-stage-validation
description: CodeBuild project BuildSpec organizes CI checks as numbered stages in build phase: (1) lint + typecheck, (2) unit tests, (3) contract tests, (4) CDK synth + cdk-nag security validation, (5) Docker image build + ECR push. Each stage explicitly echoes stage name for CloudWatch Logs clarity. Artifacts include image-uri.txt for downstream stages. Build uses Docker-in-Docker (privileged: true) with layer caching. Bun package manager cache persisted across builds.

name: test-package-workspace-integration
description: Tests as workspace member: Add 'tests' to root workspaces array, update root tsconfig.json references, tests/tsconfig.json extends root and references packages. Enables @chimera/* imports and build-time type checking across test and production code.
